subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 6: Listening
description: Nghe về phát triển sự nghiệp

sections.heading: Listening Script: A Career Counselor's Advice
sections.content:
Career Counselor: Good morning, everyone. Today, I want to talk about career development and how you can plan for a successful professional future. Many students look forward to starting their careers but feel overwhelmed by the choices ahead. Let me share some practical advice.

First, you need to come up with a clear vision of what you want to achieve. Don't just think about your first job - think about where you want to be in five, ten, or even twenty years. This long-term perspective will help you make better decisions along the way.

Second, it's crucial to get on with people from different backgrounds and industries. Networking isn't just about collecting business cards - it's about building genuine relationships. You never know when a connection might lead to an opportunity. I've seen many students catch up with industry professionals at conferences and end up with amazing job offers.

Third, you must keep up with changes in your field. Technology is evolving rapidly, and the skills that are valuable today might be obsolete tomorrow. Continuous learning is no longer optional - it's essential. Take online courses, attend workshops, and read industry publications regularly.

Now, let's talk about challenges. You'll inevitably have to put up with setbacks and rejections. Every successful person I know has faced numerous failures before achieving their goals. The key is not to run out of motivation. When you face difficulties, remember why you started and keep pushing forward.

It's also important to look up to mentors who can guide you. Find someone in your field who has achieved what you aspire to achieve. Learn from their experiences, both successes and failures. A good mentor can help you avoid common mistakes and accelerate your career growth.

You also need to face up to your weaknesses. We all have areas where we need improvement. Instead of hiding from them, acknowledge them and work on developing those skills. Your performance should live up to professional standards, and that requires honest self-assessment and continuous improvement.

If you make mistakes - and you will - don't worry. You can always make up for them by learning from the experience and doing better next time. Mistakes are valuable learning opportunities if you approach them with the right mindset.

Finally, remember that career success isn't just about climbing the corporate ladder. It's about finding work that's meaningful to you and maintaining a healthy work-life balance. Don't sacrifice your health, relationships, or personal happiness for career advancement. A truly successful career enhances your life rather than consuming it.

In conclusion, career development is a journey, not a destination. Stay curious, stay connected, and stay committed to your growth. With the right attitude and strategies, you can build a career that's both successful and fulfilling. Thank you, and I'm happy to answer any questions.

sections.heading: Key Vocabulary from the Listening
sections.content:
• overwhelmed: choáng ngợp, quá tải
  • perspective: quan điểm, góc nhìn
  • genuine: chân thành, thật
  • obsolete: lỗi thời
  • inevitable: không thể tránh khỏi
  • setback: trở ngại, thất bại tạm thời
  • aspire: khao khát, mong muốn
  • accelerate: tăng tốc
  • acknowledge: thừa nhận
  • corporate ladder: nấc thang công danh
  • fulfilling: mang lại sự thỏa mãn

sections.heading: Listening Strategies
sections.content:
Tips for Better Listening Comprehension:

  1. Preview questions: Read questions before listening to know what to focus on.
  2. Listen for key words: Pay attention to phrasal verbs and important vocabulary.
  3. Take notes: Write down main ideas and supporting details.
  4. Don't panic: If you miss something, keep listening - the answer might be repeated.
  5. Context clues: Use context to understand unfamiliar words.
  6. Listen multiple times: First for general understanding, then for specific details.

exercises.question: What is the main topic of the talk?
exercises.explanation: Chủ đề chính là 'career development and planning' - phát triển và lập kế hoạch nghề nghiệp.

exercises.question: According to the speaker, what should students do first?
options: Come up with a clear vision
exercises.explanation: Học sinh cần 'come up with a clear vision' - có tầm nhìn rõ ràng.

exercises.question: What does the speaker say about networking?
exercises.explanation: Networking là về 'building genuine relationships' - xây dựng mối quan hệ chân thành.

exercises.question: Why is continuous learning essential?
exercises.explanation: Kỹ năng có thể trở nên 'obsolete' - lỗi thời, nên học tập liên tục là cần thiết.

exercises.question: What does the speaker say about setbacks?
options: You'll have to put up with them
exercises.explanation: Bạn sẽ phải 'put up with setbacks' - chịu đựng thất bại.

exercises.question: What should you do when facing difficulties?
exercises.explanation: 'Don't run out of motivation' - đừng mất động lực khi gặp khó khăn.

exercises.question: Why should you find a mentor?
exercises.explanation: Để 'learn from their experiences' - học hỏi từ kinh nghiệm của họ.

exercises.question: What should you do with your weaknesses?
exercises.explanation: 'Face up to your weaknesses' - đối mặt với điểm yếu.

exercises.question: What does the speaker say about mistakes?
options: You can make up for them by learning
exercises.explanation: Bạn có thể 'make up for them by learning' - bù đắp bằng cách học hỏi.

exercises.question: According to the speaker, what is true career success?
options: Finding meaningful work and maintaining balance
exercises.explanation: Thành công thực sự là 'finding meaningful work and maintaining balance' - công việc ý nghĩa và cân bằng.

exercises.question_text: According to the talk, mark True or False:
options: Students should have a long-term perspective.
Networking is just about collecting business cards.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Cần có tầm nhìn dài hạn. b) False - Networking là xây dựng mối quan hệ thật. c) True - Học tập liên tục cần thiết. d) False - Nên tìm người cố vấn.

exercises.question_text: Decide True or False based on the listening:
options: Setbacks should make you give up.
You should face up to your weaknesses.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Công nghệ phát triển nhanh. b) False - Không nên bỏ cuộc. c) True - Đối mặt với điểm yếu. d) False - Không nên hy sinh mọi thứ.

options: You need to come up with a clear vision.
Career development is a destination, not a journey.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Cần có tầm nhìn rõ ràng. b) False - Kỹ năng có thể lỗi thời. c) True - Sai lầm là cơ hội học hỏi. d) False - Là hành trình, không phải đích đến.

exercises.question_text: What should students do first according to the speaker? (five words)
exercises.explanation: Come up with a clear vision - có tầm nhìn rõ ràng.

exercises.question_text: Complete: Networking is about building _____ relationships. (one word)
exercises.explanation: Genuine relationships - mối quan hệ chân thành.

exercises.question_text: What word means 'out of date' or 'no longer useful'? (one word)
exercises.explanation: Obsolete - lỗi thời.

exercises.question: How long should you think ahead when planning your career?
exercises.explanation: Nên nghĩ về 'five, ten, or even twenty years' - 5, 10, hoặc 20 năm.

exercises.question: What does the speaker say about successful people?
exercises.explanation: Người thành công đã 'faced numerous failures' - đối mặt nhiều thất bại.

exercises.question: What should your performance do?
exercises.explanation: Hiệu suất nên 'live up to professional standards' - đáp ứng tiêu chuẩn chuyên nghiệp.

exercises.question: According to the conclusion, what should you stay?
exercises.explanation: Nên 'stay curious, connected, and committed' - tò mò, kết nối và cam kết.
